name: GOLD ROCK HOLDINGS, INC.
business: Gold Rock Holdings, Inc. is a holding company that acquires technological assets, operating through its wholly-owned subsidiary LOOT8, Inc. which offers a Web3 Commerce and Content Management Engine Software, and its K-Project AI division which offers AI coding and language learning tools. The Company generates revenue from AI coding and language modeling services (one customer for $210,000) and from its Web3 platform (one customer for $1,500).
sellsTo: healthcare, law enforcement, education, travel, sports

exposures.sentence: LOOT8 is a Web3 Commerce and Content Management Engine Software.
In June 2024, the Company opened its K-Project Artificial Intelligence (AI) division that currently offers AI coding and language learning tools.
In September 2025, the Company's K-Project Division worked tirelessly on its SAID (Speech Artificial Intelligence On Demand) translation application (App).
In October 2025, the Company's K-Project Division successfully completed a beta version of its ZONE-X sports AI application (App).

Key initiatives include athletes', musicians', and influencers' Name, Image, and Likeness (NIL) rights, and revenue generation through a 10% transaction fee on subscriptions and digital collectible sales.

The third anticipated stream will utilize an enterprise model, leveraging Marcus Daley, GRHI's CEO's background with NeuralMetrics, towards Software as a Service (SaaS) and Platform as a Service (PaaS) licensing models.

catalysts.sentence: In June 2024, the Company opened its K-Project Artificial Intelligence (AI) division that currently offers AI coding and language learning tools.

catalysts.event: Launched Singer and Song Writer Contest on LOOT8
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, the Company's wholly-owned subsidiary LOOT8, Inc. launched its 'Singer and Song Writer Contest' on its Web3 social media platform.

catalysts.event: Completed beta version of ZONE-X sports AI app
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, the Company's K-Project Division successfully completed a beta version of its ZONE-X sports AI application (App).
